description: Patterns for detecting monorepo paths that should not appear in the claude-env repo.

patterns.description: Stock Analyzer project path from claudeProjects monorepo
patterns.remedy: Remove or replace this path. The claude-env repo contains tooling only, not project source. Use a relative path or a placeholder instead.

patterns.description: Road Trip Photo Map project path from claudeProjects monorepo
patterns.remedy: Remove or replace this path. The claude-env repo contains tooling only, not project source. Use a relative path or a placeholder instead.

patterns.description: EODHD Loader project path from claudeProjects monorepo
patterns.remedy: Remove or replace this path. The claude-env repo contains tooling only, not project source. Use a relative path or a placeholder instead.
Replace with a relative path or generic placeholder. Hardcoding the monorepo root couples this tooling to a specific checkout structure.

patterns.description: GitHub repo slug for the claudeProjects monorepo (owner/repo form)
patterns.remedy: Replace with the claude-env repo slug (psford/claude-env) or remove. This reference should not appear in standalone tooling.

patterns.description: Full GitHub URL for the claudeProjects monorepo
patterns.remedy: Replace with the claude-env repo URL (github.com/psford/claude-env) or remove the hardcoded URL.

patterns.description: GitHub Pages URL for the claudeProjects docs site
patterns.remedy: Replace with the claude-env Pages URL or a generic placeholder. This URL belongs to the monorepo, not the standalone tooling repo.
